subcodes.first_line: O ye daughters of the Kingdom! There is very little time. All the letters which have come from the East and the West have remained without answer
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بهآء آسمانی ما ضعيفيم و تو توانا ما فقيريم و تو کنز غنا تأييدی فرما
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @firmness in the Covenant, @naming of children; of individuals, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
